title: Hold Period Phase 7 — Exit Trigger & Verdict Downstream Data
description: Shape of the dataForDownstream object written to the master checkpoint by the hold-period trigger evaluation phase. This is the terminal hold-period phase. Its output routes the asset to CONTINUE (next hold cycle), INTERVENE (90-day operational sprint), or EXIT (disposition or refi pipeline handoff).

exitTriggerAssessment.description: Quantitative hold-vs-sell-vs-refi comparison and market cycle positioning.

holdNPV.description: NPV analysis of continuing to hold the asset through the underwritten exit date.

value.description: NPV of remaining hold-period cash flows plus terminal value, discounted at the equity hurdle rate.

terminalValue.description: Projected sale price at underwritten exit date (NOI / exit cap rate).

remainingHoldMonths.description: Months remaining in the underwritten hold period.

assumptions.description: Key assumptions used in hold NPV calculation.

sellNPV.description: NPV analysis of selling the asset at current market value.

value.description: Net equity proceeds from current sale, discounted to today.

estimatedSalePrice.description: Estimated gross sale price based on current market cap rate applied to T-12 NOI.

impliedCapRate.description: Implied cap rate from estimated sale price and T-12 NOI.

transactionCosts.description: Estimated total transaction costs (broker, legal, transfer taxes).

loanPayoff.description: Outstanding loan balance to be repaid at closing.

estimatedTaxLiability.description: Estimated capital gains and depreciation recapture tax liability.

netProceeds.description: Estimated net equity proceeds after all costs, payoffs, and taxes.

is1031Eligible.description: True if asset qualifies for 1031 exchange deferral.

netProceedsIf1031.description: Net proceeds if taxes deferred via 1031 exchange.

refiNPV.description: NPV analysis of cash-out refinance plus continued hold.

isViable.description: True if refinance terms are achievable given current market and covenant constraints.

value.description: NPV of cash-out proceeds plus projected hold period cash flows and terminal value under new debt structure. Null if not viable.

estimatedNewLoanAmount.description: Estimated new loan balance at refinance.

estimatedCashOut.description: Estimated equity proceeds from refinance (new loan minus payoff).

projectedNewDSCR.description: Projected DSCR under new debt terms.

projectedNewRate.description: Estimated interest rate on new loan.

notViableReason.description: Explanation if refinance is not viable (e.g., LTV too high, DSCR insufficient).

marketCyclePosition.description: Mueller Real Estate Cycle positioning and implications.

phase.description: Current phase of the real estate cycle for this property's submarket.

cyclePositionWithinPhase.description: Position within the current cycle phase.

submarketOccupancyTrend.description: Direction of submarket occupancy over trailing 4 quarters.

capRateTrend.description: Direction of submarket cap rates over trailing 4 quarters.

supplyDemandBalance.description: Current supply-demand dynamic in the submarket.

cycleImplication.description: Narrative interpretation of cycle position for hold-vs-sell decision.

returnOnRemainingEquity.description: Marginal return analysis on equity currently trapped in the asset.

currentEquityValue.description: Estimated current equity value (market value minus loan balance).

projectedNextYearReturn.description: Projected next-12-month total return on equity (cash yield + appreciation).

opportunityCostRate.description: Hurdle rate for alternative equity deployment (fund target return).

isReturnAboveHurdle.description: True if projected next-year return exceeds opportunity cost rate.

exitTriggersFired.description: Specific threshold-based exit triggers that are active.

triggerName.description: e.g., DSCR_BREACH, WALT_BELOW_TARGET, NOI_VARIANCE_CRITICAL, CAP_RATE_EXPANSION, LOAN_MATURITY_WITHIN_12M.

consecutiveInterveneQuarters.description: Number of consecutive monitoring cycles with INTERVENE or EXIT_TRIGGER verdict.

repositionPlan.description: 90-day operational sprint plan. Required when verdict is INTERVENE; null otherwise.

isActive.description: True if the reposition plan is activated (verdict = INTERVENE).

targetNOIImprovement.description: Projected annualized NOI improvement if all sprint actions execute successfully.

sprintDurationDays.description: Duration of the operational sprint in calendar days.

successCriteria.description: Definition of success — the conditions that would shift verdict to CONTINUE at the next review.

revenueLevers.description: Revenue enhancement actions in the sprint plan.

lever.description: Action description (e.g., Increase asking rents 5%, Launch concession burn-off).

projectedImpact.description: Estimated annualized NOI impact in dollars.

expenseLevers.description: Expense reduction actions in the sprint plan.

projectedImpact.description: Estimated annualized cost savings in dollars.

weeklyKPIs.description: Week-by-week KPI targets for the sprint (typically 13 weeks).

collectionsTarget.description: Target collection rate for the week (0–1).

occupancyTarget.description: Target physical occupancy for the week (0–1).

leasingVelocityTarget.description: Target new leases or renewals executed.

expenseRunRateTarget.description: Target weekly operating expense run rate.

escalationThreshold.description: Conditions that would automatically escalate to EXIT verdict mid-sprint.

autoEscalateWeek.description: Week number at which auto-escalation is evaluated if KPIs are missed.

dispositionHandoff.description: Handoff package for the disposition pipeline. Required when verdict is EXIT with sell recommendation; null otherwise.

isActive.description: True if disposition handoff is activated.

holdPeriodSummary.description: Cumulative hold period performance versus underwriting.

totalCashDistributed.description: Total distributions to equity during hold.

unrealizedGain.description: Estimated current equity value minus equity invested.

currentOperatingMetrics.description: Current operating snapshot for disposition marketing package.

capRateBasis.description: Market cap rate applied to T-12 NOI to arrive at estimated sale price.

estimatedNetProceeds.description: Estimated equity proceeds net of loan payoff, costs, and taxes.

targetMarketingLaunchDate.description: Target date to launch disposition marketing.

dataRoomStatus.description: Status of disposition data room preparation.

brokerRecommendation.description: Recommended disposition broker or process type.

marketLiquidityRating.description: Estimated buyer pool depth and transaction volume.

refiHandoff.description: Handoff package for the capital stack pipeline. Required when verdict is EXIT with refi recommendation; null otherwise.

isActive.description: True if capital stack handoff is activated.

refinanceObjective.description: Target terms and objectives for the new financing.

targetProceeds.description: Target cash-out proceeds (new loan minus payoff).

targetLoanType.description: e.g., Permanent, Bridge, CMBS, Agency, Life Co.

targetTermYears.description: Target new loan term in years.

lenderTargetList.description: Lenders to approach for the refinance.

currentNOI.description: Current T-12 NOI used for refinance underwriting.

currentEstimatedValue.description: Current estimated property value for refinance sizing.

targetMarketingDate.description: Target date to begin lender outreach.

verdict.description: Terminal hold-period verdict. CONTINUE: asset on track, proceed to next monitoring cycle. INTERVENE: activate 90-day operational sprint. EXIT: route to disposition or refi pipeline.

convictionScore.description: Confidence level in the verdict (0–100). Scores below 60 trigger challenge-layer review before the verdict is finalized.

verdictRationale.description: 2–3 sentence explanation of the primary factors driving the verdict.

keyRisks.description: Top risks that could change the verdict at the next review cycle.

keyMerits.description: Top supporting factors for the verdict.

nextReviewDate.description: Scheduled date of next trigger evaluation cycle.
